title: Tiny: The Life of Erin Blackwell
original_title: Tiny: The Life of Erin Blackwell
overview: Filmmaker Martin Bell chronicles the life of Erin Blackwell, mother of 10 children, from the time she was a 14-year-old prostitute through her battle with drug addiction, poverty and parenting.
